issue.title: earnow.online
issue.body:
### Issue URL (Anti Adblock Script) [http://earnow.online/Fpjn4bG](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=http%3A%2F%2Fearnow.online%2FFpjn4bG) ### Comment > 1枚目AdGuardあり > 画面上部にValidation attempt denied1. Disable adblocker or bypass extension then reload! > と表示されて、メーターが動かない。 > > > 2枚目AdGuard無し > Scroll downと表示され、メーターが読み込まれている。 > > また、このメーターが読み込まれなければ、「私はロボットではありません」が表示されないため、次へ行くことができない。 ### Screenshots

issue.title: nic.eu.org
issue.body: ### Prerequisites - [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml); - [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue; - [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date; - [x] Browser version is up-to-date; - [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue. ### What product do you use? AdGuard DNS ### AdGuard version N/A ### What type of problem have you encountered? Website or app doesn't work properly ### Which browser(s) do you use? Chrome ### Which device do you use? Desktop ### Where is the problem encountered? https://nic.eu.org/ ### Ad Blocking AdGuard Base filter, EasyList ### Privacy _No response_ ### Social Widgets _No response_ ### Annoyances _No response_ ### Security _No response_ ### Other _No response_ ### DNS filters AdGuard DNS filter ### Language-specific _No response_ ### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled? _No response_ ### Add your comment and screenshots AdGuard DNS blocks `nic.eu.org` as "Newly registered domains" as of May 7, 2026, when was not a newly registered domain. The block seems to have expired, but this is likely a bug on AdGuard's end. ### Privacy - [x] I agree to follow this condition

issue.title: nic.eu.org
issue.body: ### Prerequisites - [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml); - [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue; - [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date; - [x] Browser version is up-to-date; - [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue. ### What product do you use? AdGuard DNS ### AdGuard version N/A ### What type of problem have you encountered? Website or app doesn't work properly ### Which browser(s) do you use? Chrome ### Which device do you use? Desktop ### Where is the problem encountered? https://nic.eu.org/ ### Ad Blocking AdGuard Base filter, EasyList ### Privacy _No response_ ### Social Widgets _No response_ ### Annoyances _No response_ ### Security _No response_ ### Other _No response_ ### DNS filters AdGuard DNS filter ### Language-specific _No response_ ### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled? _No response_ ### Add your comment and screenshots AdGuard DNS blocks `nic.eu.org` as "Newly registered domains" as of May 7, 2026, when was not a newly registered domain. The block seems to have expired, but this is likely a bug on AdGuard's end. ### Privacy - [x] I agree to follow this condition
